name: Syntrixa OpenClaw P2 n8n Workflow Architecture

parameters.content:
### Syntrixa OpenClaw P2 n8n Architecture
- OpenClaw has ZERO external access.
- n8n is the only external execution layer.
- OpenClaw returns structured request candidates only.
- n8n owns DB, memory, identity, communication, analytics, health checks, credentials, retries, audit, and infra.
- This workflow intentionally reuses shared utility nodes instead of duplicating logic across all P2 workflows.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ context_package: $json.context_package || $json, boundary: { openclaw_external_access: false, n8n_owns_execution: true }, requested_agent: $json.target_agent || $json.agent || "syntra-supervisor" }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
return items.map((item) => ({ json: {
  ...item.json,
  context_package: {
    package_id: item.json.id || $execution.id,
    source_workflow: item.json.current_workflow || $workflow.name,
    subject_refs: item.json.subject_refs || {},
    scopes: item.json.required_scopes || item.json.scopes || [item.json.workflow_category || item.json.category || 'workflow_state'],
    facts: item.json.facts || [],
    lead: item.json.lead || item.json.contact || undefined,
    contact: item.json.contact || item.json.payload?.contact || undefined,
    account: item.json.account || item.json.payload?.account || undefined,
    identity_context: item.json.identity_context || undefined,
    public_intelligence: item.json.public_intelligence || [],
    analytics_context: item.json.analytics_context || undefined,
    crm_context: item.json.crm_context || undefined,
    monitoring_context: item.json.monitoring_context || item.json.failure_context || undefined,
    workflow_state: item.json.workflow_state || {},
    lifecycle_state: item.json.lifecycle_state || {},
    knowledge_context: item.json.knowledge_context || [],
    constraints: { minimal_context: true, no_raw_secrets: true, retention: item.json.retention_hint || 'session' }
  }
}}));

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.audit_logs (request_id, workflow_name, category, requester, status, payload, created_at) VALUES (:request_id, :workflow_name, :category, :requester, :status, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
SELECT * FROM public.workflow_state WHERE request_id = :request_id; -- plus identity/consent/lead context views owned by n8n

nodes.name: WF009 Lead Qualification Context Retrieval Workflow

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $json.id, account: $json.account || $json.payload?.account, constraints: { no_raw_secrets: true, minimal_context: true } }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.identity_context WHERE request_id = :request_id; -- n8n owned identity lookup
SELECT * FROM public.workflow_state WHERE request_id = :request_id; -- prior conversation context
SELECT * FROM public.knowledge_index WHERE category = :category LIMIT 20;
SELECT * FROM public.working_memory WHERE request_id = :request_id UNION ALL SELECT * FROM public.shared_memory WHERE category = :category;
INSERT INTO public.working_memory (request_id, payload, updated_at) VALUES (:request_id, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
INSERT INTO public.long_memory (request_id, category, payload, created_at) VALUES (:request_id, :category, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
SELECT * FROM public.private_memory WHERE requester = :requester;
INSERT INTO public.private_memory (requester, payload, created_at) VALUES (:requester, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
SELECT * FROM public.shared_memory WHERE category = :category;
INSERT INTO public.shared_memory (category, payload, created_at) VALUES (:category, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
SELECT * FROM public.identity_context WHERE request_id = :request_id;
SELECT * FROM public.knowledge_index WHERE category = :category LIMIT 20;
SELECT * FROM public.workflow_state WHERE request_id = :request_id;
INSERT INTO public.lifecycle_state (request_id, workflow_name, payload, updated_at) VALUES (:request_id, :workflow_name, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
INSERT INTO public.agent_handoffs (request_id, requester, payload, created_at) VALUES (:request_id, :requester, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
INSERT INTO public.observability_events (request_id, category, payload, created_at) VALUES (:request_id, :category, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());
INSERT INTO public.workflow_logs (request_id, workflow_name, status, payload, created_at) VALUES (:request_id, :workflow_name, :status, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());

INSERT INTO public.audit_logs (request_id, workflow_name, category, requester, status, payload, created_at) VALUES (:request_id, :workflow_name, :category, :requester, :status, CAST(:payload AS jsonb), NOW());

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => ({ json: { ...item.json, status: 'ERROR_RETRY_REVIEW', retry_owned_by: 'n8n', current_workflow: 'UTIL021 Shared Retry and Corrective Action Handler' } }));

nodes.name: UTIL021 Shared Retry and Corrective Action Handler

main.node: WF009 Lead Qualification Context Retrieval Workflow
UTIL021 Shared Retry and Corrective Action Handler
